scripts.prestart: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$p=(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8081 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -First 1); if ($p) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force }"
scripts.start:tunnel: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$env:CI='1'; $env:NGROK_AUTHTOKEN=((Get-Content '.env' | Where-Object { $_ -match '^NGROK_AUTHTOKEN=' } | Select-Object -First 1) -replace '^NGROK_AUTHTOKEN=','').Trim(); expo start --tunnel --port 8081"
scripts.start:tunnel:clear: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$env:CI='1'; $env:NGROK_AUTHTOKEN=((Get-Content '.env' | Where-Object { $_ -match '^NGROK_AUTHTOKEN=' } | Select-Object -First 1) -replace '^NGROK_AUTHTOKEN=','').Trim(); expo start --tunnel --port 8081 --clear"
